acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Current local HEAD and live remote bos/issue-51 equal the reviewed exact commit
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: git status --porcelain=v1 was empty; local HEAD, refs/remotes/origin/bos/issue-51, and live git ls-remote refs/heads/bos/issue-51 all returned 40750c297ed42435dabe1d4670bfda85ce92af36; ahead/behind was 0/0.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: All valid durable review findings are corrected
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Functional, security, quality, and visual reviews passed. The sole blocking architecture finding concerned missing current identity evidence; fresh local/tracking/live-remote checks resolve it without a source change.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Complete capacity-wait reconciliation patch remains correct
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Reviewed all 8 changed files and 311 insertions/2 deletions from base 8c2ec23a4a7873890a81562a1e701efae684be34. Missing, terminal, and unroutable waiters release provider/local reservations; release failure preserves fencing; foreign ownership drops local state only; valid owned claims heartbeat without Attempt/retry consumption.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Full Elixir gate passes with 100 percent coverage, Credo and Dialyzer
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Fresh cycle-2 validation: 363 tests, 0 failures, 2 skipped; 100.00% coverage; public-spec check and strict Credo found no issues; Dialyzer reported zero errors; formatting and diff hygiene passed.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Exact merged artifact is installed and service remains healthy
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: This is a pre-merge repair cycle. Exact merged-artifact installation and DeploymentVerification remain post-merge delivery responsibilities.
The exact patch is backend orchestration, adapter/client, tests, and documentation only, with no visual surface changes.

checks.command: cd elixir && mise exec -- mix test
cd elixir && mise exec -- mix test --cover
cd elixir && mise exec -- mix lint
checks.summary: Public-spec check passed; strict Credo checked 80 files and found no issues.

checks.command: cd elixir && mise exec -- mix dialyzer
cd elixir && mise exec -- mix format --check-formatted

git status --porcelain=v1; git rev-parse HEAD; git rev-parse refs/remotes/origin/bos/issue-51; git ls-remote --heads origin refs/heads/bos/issue-51; git rev-list --left-right --count HEAD...refs/remotes/origin/bos/issue-51
checks.summary: Clean worktree; local HEAD, tracking ref, and live remote all equal 40750c297ed42435dabe1d4670bfda85ce92af36; ahead/behind 0/0.
No whitespace errors in the complete issue patch.

residualRisk.risk: Exact merged-artifact installation and service-health verification remain outstanding until after merge.
residualRisk.mitigation: The delivery coordinator must bind deployment verification to the exact merged commit before terminal completion.

summary: Repair cycle 2 found no valid source correction. It independently re-confirmed clean local, tracking, and live remote branch identity at exact HEAD 40750c297ed42435dabe1d4670bfda85ce92af36, inspected the complete 8-file patch, and reran the full repository validation successfully.
